title: Surgeon Vacancy at Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
